DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Hayes, 858.345.5080 of Andrews, Lagasse, Brancj & Bell, LLP for Defendant Sequoia Real Estate. (courtcall)
No other appearances.

The Defendant does not contest the tentative ruling.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STEPHANIE MATES, SEQUOIA REAL ESTATE, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend First and Second causes of action. Each element in a cause of action for fraud or negligent misrepresentation must be factually and specifically pled. (Cadlo v. Owens-Illinois, Inc. (2004) 125 Cal.App.4th 513, 519. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
